name: Quick Hummus
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Arrowhead Mills Am Garbanzo Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, stir garbanzo flour into the cold water until smooth.
2. Heat mixture until bubbly, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and add lemon juice, tahini, garlic, and salt if used. Mix well; cool.
4. If the mixture appears too thick, add more water before serving.
5. Pour oil over hummus, or stir into the mixture.
